testcase.name: testPlaceOrderWithValidDetailsAndVerifyConfirmation

failure.message: Test Failed: Missing Order ID. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: testPlaceOrderWithEmptyForm

failure.message: Negative Test Failed: Expected alert text was incorrect. expected [Please fill out Card and Name.] but found [Please fill out Name and Creditcard.]
